ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team manager */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team captain */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameweeks" (
  "gw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gameweek */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the gameweek belongs to */,
  "gw_no" INTEGER /* Gameweek number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the gameweek */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the gameweek */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches in the gameweek */,
  "gameweek_status" TEXT /* Status of the gameweek (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookie_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the bookmaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the bookmaker */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the bookmaker operates */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the bookmaker's license */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the bookmaker */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the bookmaker's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the prediction is for */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model making the prediction */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Predicted number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Predicted number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "probability_home_win" REAL /* Probability of the home team winning */,
  "probability_draw" REAL /* Probability of a draw */,
  "probability_away_win" REAL /* Probability of the away team winning */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction (calculated after the match) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_actions" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the bet is placed on */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet placed (e.g., home win, draw, away win) */,
  "stake" INTEGER /* Stake placed on the bet */,
  "returns" INTEGER /* Returns from the bet */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Profit made from the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, settled, void) */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., win, lose, push) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., casual fan, professional bettor) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "total_bets_placed" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed by the user */,
  "total_profit" INTEGER /* Total profit made by the user */,
  "preferred_teams" TEXT /* List of preferred teams (JSON array of team IDs) */,
  "preferred_bookmakers" TEXT /* List of preferred bookmakers (JSON array of bookmaker IDs) */,
  "responsible_gambling_settings" TEXT /* Settings for responsible gambling (JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of betting odds */,
  "bookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker offering the odds */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the odds are for */,
  "home_odds" REAL /* Odds for the home team to win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_odds" REAL /* Odds for the away team to win */,
  "bookie_prediction" TEXT /* Bookmaker's prediction for the match outcome */,
  "odds_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the odds were set */,
  "odds_status" TEXT /* Status of the odds (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "odds_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the odds provided by the bookmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_bookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookie_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookie_id")
)
